name: README and tool table updates
description: Update the root README.md tools table to include the certs subcommand. Create apps/certs/README.md documenting Quick Start usage, all CLI flags, example commands (ct mode, tls mode, all mode, stdin pipeline), and the output JSON schema.
acceptance_criteria: Root README.md tools table includes a row for 'certs' with description and 'stable' status
apps/certs/README.md exists with Quick Start section showing basic usage
apps/certs/README.md includes example commands for each mode (ct, tls, all)
apps/certs/README.md includes an example of piping port scan output into certs
apps/certs/README.md includes the output JSON schema (CertsResult fields)
